description: Coulson and Hunter arrive at the Retreat, observing the aftermath of Skye’s encounter with S.H.I.E.L.D. agents. They watch security footage that confirms Skye’s significant new abilities and contemplate how to proceed as they realize the scale of what has happened. Both are troubled by Skye's transformation and abduction, unsure how to recover her.

transcript.line: Did they do this to her, or did she do it to them?
My God. Skye's doing that? Glad she's on our side. She's still on our side, isn't she?
Well, at least they didn't take her. That means she's out there, so we'll find her and... that's new. Did she just get abducted by aliens? What the hell was that?
We don't know what he is. He took Skye's father and Raina.
Seriously? I was only gone a week.
We don't know where he comes from, where he goes, or who he works for. He doesn't leave trails or clues. I lost her.
